name: Italian Gocci Di Cioccolata
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Sift together the first eight dry ingredients.
3. Cream shortening, sugar, and egg on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and creamy. Add the dry ingredients alternately with milk, mixing just until the batter is smooth.
4. Drop dough by rounded spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 9-12 minutes, or until set. Remove to a rack and cool completely.
Glaze and decoration:
6. Combine icing sugar, vanilla, almond extract, and enough milk to make a medium glaze consistency. Color as desired. Spread over a few cookies at a time, sprinkle with candy decorations. Let the glaze set before storing.
Makes: About 5 dozen cookies. Freezing: Excellent
